title: Triangle Angle
text: We have a west component (30m) and a south component (40m). The resultant points into the southwest quadrant.

title: Apply Arctan Function
text: The vector ends $$30m$$ west and $$40m$$ south of start. The compass bearing from north (clockwise) is $$180+\arctan\left(\frac{30}{40}\right)$$. What is this value?
